message.reasoning_content:
We need to create page 3 and link it back to page 2, while preserving existing page 1 and page 2 links. Existing files: site/index.html (has link to page-2.html), site/page-2.html (has link to index.html). We need to add site/page-3.html with appropriate content, and modify page-2.html to include a link to page-3.html (preserving existing link to index). Also ensure page-3 links back to page-2. Also preserve page-1 link to page-2 unchanged. Thus we need to output JSON with modified site/page-2.html (add link to page-3.html) and new site/page-3.html. We must ensure navigation area includes both links. In page-2.html currently nav only has Home. We'll add after that a link to page-3.html, maybe Page 3. Ensure HTML valid. Also page-3.html should have nav linking back to page-2.html (maybe also link to home? Not required, but at least back to page-2). The validator "page-3-links-page-2" expects page-3 links page-2. Also "previous-links-preserved" expects that existing links (page-1 to page-2, page-2 to page-1) are preserved. So we must not remove the existing link from page-2 to index.html. Thus modify page-2.html nav to include both links. Now produce JSON. Content for page-2.html after modification: Page 2
Home Page 3

Page 2

This is the second page in the chain.

Now page-3.html: Page 3
Back to Page 2

Page 3

This is the third page in the chain.

We must ensure JSON escaping of newlines and quotes. Also note that we need to include both files in "files" array. Now produce final JSON.
